title: Privacy Policy
subheading: How Emerging Technologies, Inc. collects, uses, safeguards, and retains personal information.
intro: We are committed to protecting the privacy and confidentiality of personal information entrusted to us.
body:
At ETI, we are committed to protecting the privacy and confidentiality of personal information entrusted to us. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard personal data in relation to our IT consulting services and software development for healthcare companies. By engaging our services, you consent to the practices described below.

## Information Collection and Use

We may collect personal information, such as names, contact details, and job titles, to provide our services effectively. This data is used for project management, communication, and delivering customized solutions to our clients.

## Data Sharing and Disclosure

We may share personal information with authorized personnel and subcontractors involved in providing our services. However, we do not disclose personal data to third parties unless required by law or with explicit consent.

## Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect personal information from unauthorized access, misuse, or alteration. We regularly review and update our security practices to maintain data integrity and confidentiality.

## Retention and Deletion

We retain personal information only for the duration necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by law. Upon request or contract completion, we will securely delete or anonymize personal data in our possession.

## Compliance

We comply with applicable data protection laws, including but not limited to the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA). We strive to ensure that our data practices align with relevant privacy regulations.

## Cookies and Tracking Technologies

Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance user experience and gather usage statistics. These technologies may collect non-personally identifiable information, such as IP addresses and browser details, for analytical and marketing purposes.

## Changes to the Privacy Policy

We reserve the right to update or modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be effective upon posting the revised version on our website. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we handle personal information.

## Contact Information

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding our privacy practices or the personal data we hold, please contact us using the information provided below.

**Emerging Technologies, Inc.**

Email: [info@emergingti.com](mailto:info@emergingti.com)

Phone: [847-498-0946](tel:8474980946)

By using our IT consulting and software development services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy and consent to the collection, use, and disclosure of your personal information as described herein.
